configured.description: Whether credentials are configured (not necessarily valid)
configured.title: Configured

valid.description: Whether credentials are valid and connectivity works
valid.title: Valid

info.description:
PoundCake ticketing system integration service.

Bakery acts as a translation layer between the PoundCake API and external communication systems (ServiceNow, Jira, GitHub Issues, PagerDuty, Rackspace Core, Teams, Discord). It receives generic communication requests, queues operations, and processes them asynchronously via worker(s).

## Request Flow

1. `POST /api/v1/communications` - Submit open request (returns 202 with UUID handles)
2. `GET /api/v1/communications/operations/{operation_id}` - Poll operation status
3. `GET /api/v1/communications/{communication_id}` - Read logical communication state
info.title: Bakery

get.description: Returns the health status of Bakery and its dependencies. Used by Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes.
Returns all registered mixer types and their current configuration status. Use this to discover which ticketing or messaging systems Bakery can communicate with.

post.description: Tests connectivity and authentication with the specified communication system. Makes a live API call to verify the configured credentials are valid.

tags.description: Submit and query provider-agnostic communications. Mutating endpoints return operation handles and are processed asynchronously.
tags.name: communications

tags.description: Discover and validate ticketing system integrations. Each mixer corresponds to an external ticketing system (ServiceNow, Jira, GitHub, PagerDuty, Rackspace Core).
tags.name: mixers
